title: The Caged Lady (Varen’s Orb)
bodyText:
A dark orb ringed in dancing light that visits Varen's trances; growing brighter, trying to change shape. Female voice: *"I am a guide to those who need escape and refuge. I am in a cage. An unending cage. Help your friend. Help find him. Bring him back."* Flew over **Eddy** and faded (S07).

> [!dm] Candidates: **Leliana** (in the pool, wants Lathander's trinity reunited — "bring HIM back") vs **Eilistraee** (guide of escaping drow, caged = Lolth's web?). The docs support both; the ambiguity is currently safe, but the answer changes who Varen serves.
